name: Eekso — Webs in the Dark
dmNotes: OPTIONAL DROW AMBUSH (Claude prep 2026-07-16). ⚑ Framing proposal: these drow are OBSERVERS who got caught, not defenders — Lolth's eyes on the road to the pool (what they do during the release is still open in grill-queue). They open with crossbows + darkness, and they'd rather WITHDRAW with information than die. Stat reskins (SRD has no drow): Spy = drow stalker, Priest = priestess of Lolth, Phase Spider as-is. ~1,750 XP vs a level-6 party of 4 = pressure, not a meat grinder — add a 4th stalker if they're fresh. Battle map: 🗺 Eekso — The Drowned Hall (fog set, tokens placed, foes hidden — double-click to unhide as they act).

music.label: They are watching
music.file: music/Russell Shaw - Fae Tales- They Are Watching.mp3

music.label: The priestess steps out
music.file: music/Secession Studios, Greg Dombrowski - I Am the Shadow.mp3

ideas.text: A captured stalker trades truth for release: 'The Queen does not want the Dancer freed. She wants to choose WHERE.'  ⚑ proposal
If the priestess escapes, the pool's defenders know EXACTLY who is coming — costs them surprise later
The webs burn fast and bright — light, chaos, and the whole gallery knows where they are

entities.name: Drow stalkers ×3
entities.note: SRD Spy reskin. Crossbows, elevation, withdraw at half.

entities.name: Priestess of Lolth
entities.note: SRD Priest reskin. Watches first. Wants a report, not bodies.

entities.name: Phase spider
entities.note: Her pet. Phases in on round 2.
